name: Bremen (Germany, city)
description: Eight horizontal red-and-white stripes with a 2-by-8 chequer of red-and-white squares (the Hanseatic Speck) on the hoist.
history: The 'Speckflagge' has been used as Bremen's civic flag since at least the 15th century; distinguished from the state flag of the Free Hanseatic City of Bremen (which adds a coat of arms).

features.symbolism: the Hanseatic livery of red and white
Two-column chequer of red-and-white squares (the Hanseatic Speck) along the hoist edge, marking Bremen as a Hanseatic city.
